description.content: Privacy-preserving GlobalPayTo resolver and hosted action APIs.

item.name: Check Pay-To eligibility for submitted candidates

request.name: Check Pay-To eligibility for submitted candidates

description.content:
Checks whether submitted candidate identifiers are eligible for a dapp's
Pay-To flow. This route is deliberately candidate-based and does not
expose a list-all payment-stamp resolver.

response.name: Eligibility was checked for the submitted candidates.
The authenticated caller is not allowed to perform this operation.
The caller exceeded a rate limit.

header.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying, when available.

dapp user. This write route requires an `Idempotency-Key` header.

description.content:
Sends the constrained GlobalPayTo MVP payment notification. The public
SDK only supports `payment_event_type: payment_intent_created` with
`category: TRANSACTIONAL` for this route.

description.content:
This OpenAPI document is the source of truth for lightweight HTTP API
documentation in this SDK repository.

The first documented surface is the server/Edge Pay-To MVP contract used by
`@cubid/core`. These routes are dapp-authenticated and must be called from
trusted server runtimes, not directly from browsers.
